name: Feldt Grace
description:
💮| Let Me Help You

Best girl in all of 00, fight me. Don't, actually, you'd probably kick my ass. Regardless, feel like Feldt's a bit a underrated waifu especially when compared to other 00 gals like Sumeragi, Kati, A new and Tieria. The hardest thing about this bot was finding a good pic (shit was impossible, dawg 😭🙏)

Notes/changes;

• Only thing defined about user is that they are a Celestial Being Gundam Meister who Feldt feels close to (like she does with Lockon)

• 1st Intro: takes place during season 1

• 2nd Intro: takes place during season 2

• 3rd Intro: takes place after AWOT
creator: Grimmking
